ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the person */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the work class of the person */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the person */,
  "education_no" INTEGER /* Number of years of education completed */,
  "maritalstatus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the person */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the person */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship status of the person */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the person */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the person */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains reported by the person */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses reported by the person */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country of the person */,
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salary bracket of the person */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the person */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Disability status of the person */,
  "veteran_status" INTEGER /* Veteran status of the person */,
  "citizenship_status" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_maritalstatus_id FOREIGN KEY ("maritalstatus_id") REFERENCES maritalstatuses ("maritalstatus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_salary_id FOREIGN KEY ("salary_id") REFERENCES salaries ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "is_government" INTEGER /* Indicates if the work class is related to government employment */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for the work class */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the education level in years */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maritalstatuses" (
  "maritalstatus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "maritalstatus_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "is_married" INTEGER /* Indicates if the person is married */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the person has */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maritalstatus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the occupation */,
  "average_hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week for the occupation */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for the occupation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship status */,
  "is_head_of_household" INTEGER /* Indicates if the person is the head of the household */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the race */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "gender_identification" TEXT /* Gender identification of the person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country is located in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary bracket */,
  "salary_bracket" TEXT /* Name of the salary bracket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the salary bracket */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for the salary bracket */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages in the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income for the age group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income for the education level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_bracket_name" TEXT /* Name of the income bracket */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Range of income in the bracket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income for the income bracket */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours_worked" (
  "hours_worked_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hours worked range */,
  "hours_worked_range" TEXT /* Range of hours worked per week */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hours worked range */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income for the hours worked range */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_worked_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last password change time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the record */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
